identity.name: ITDR — Impossible Travel (Okta sign-ins from US-West and APAC-East)
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-ITDR-001. Plane: ITDR. Primary technique: T1078.004. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-ITDR-001. Plane: ITDR. Primary technique: T1078.004. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-ITDR-001.
UC: Geo-Anomaly Sign-In Detection / TC: Two Successful Sign-Ins From Geographically Impossible Locations Within 5 min.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-ITDR-001 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm idp_signin_emulator plugin is registered
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe idp_signin_emulator \
  | jq -e '.eal_targets | length > 0'
# step-2: Emit two successful Okta sign-in events from US-West then APAC-East
: "${COLLECTOR_URL:=https://collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid/idp/events}"
: "${COLLECTOR_HOST:=collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid}"
cat > /tmp/itdr-001.yml <<YML
campaign_id: CMP-ITDR-001
name: "ITDR — Okta impossible travel"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - "$COLLECTOR_HOST"
dry_run: false
tags: [itdr, okta, impossible-travel]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: idp_signin_emulator
    params:
      collector_url: "$COLLECTOR_URL"
      provider: okta
      event_pattern: impossible_travel
      target_user: "ada.lovelace@cortexsim-canary.invalid"
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/itdr-001.yml --live
# step-3: Repeat the pattern with Microsoft event shape — confirm parser works for both
: "${COLLECTOR_URL:=https://collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid/idp/events}"
: "${COLLECTOR_HOST:=collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid}"
cat > /tmp/itdr-001-ms.yml <<YML
campaign_id: CMP-ITDR-001
name: "ITDR — Microsoft impossible travel"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - "$COLLECTOR_HOST"
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: idp_signin_emulator
    params:
      collector_url: "$COLLECTOR_URL"
      provider: microsoft
      event_pattern: impossible_travel
      target_user: "ada.lovelace@cortexsim-canary.invalid"
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/itdr-001-ms.yml --live

expected_artifacts.description: Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step
